{"problem_standardized_math":"Implement the steepest descent method and Newton's method with the backtracking line search of Algorithm 3.1, and use them to minimize the Rosenbrock function\n\\[\nf(x)=100(x_2-x_1^2)^2+(1-x_1)^2.\n\\]\nSet the initial step length to \\(\\alpha_0=1\\), and at each iteration print the step length used by each method. First use the initial point \\(x_0=(1.2,1.2)^T\\), and then use the more difficult starting point \\(x_0=(-1.2,1)^T\\)."}
